holdings.n: Dws Govt Money Market Series Institutional Shares

holdings.infoBox: IND is an equity ETF with a total of 506 individual holdings. The top holdings are HDFC Bank stock at 5.79%, ICICI Bank at 4.63%, Reliance Industries at 4.34%, Bharti Airtel at 2.77%, and MSCI India Index Future Sept 26 at 2.51%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers Nifty 500 India ETF (IND) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nifty 500 - INR index. The fund tracks an all-cap equity index, covering 90% of the stocks listed on the National Stock Exchange of India. After initial screening, the index selects the top 500 stocks based on market-cap and weights holdings based on free-float market-cap. IND was launched on Nov 25, 2025 and is issued by Xtrackers.

holdings.n: Dws Govt Money Market Series Institutional Shares
